headline: NXP Delivers New Innovations for Advanced Physical AI with NVIDIA
summary: Secure, reliable real-time data processing and transport solutions for next-generation physical AI applications, developed in collaboration with NVIDIANVIDIA humanoid robotics solutions integrated into NXP’s safe, secure edge portfolio cut development costs and speed time to marketFirst in a series of NXP’s foundational robotics solutions designed to accelerate physical AI development and deployment SAN JOSE, Calif., March 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) today
